claim: Tier 7.1l locked the Tier 7.1k persist3 false-positive repair and tested it on 12 held-out NAB streams across 6 categories. The policy reduced v2.3 false positives versus raw v2.3, but did not confirm public usefulness: v2.3 ranked fifth under the locked policy, did not beat rolling z-score or v2.2, and separated only two of three shams.
caveat: Software holdout confirmation only; this narrows the NAB claim and blocks any public usefulness proof, baseline freeze, hardware/native transfer, or AGI/ASI claim from the 7.1k same-subset repair.
